Uses of Package
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Packages that use com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Jackson types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
 
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part
 
  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
    Class
    Description
    Configuration
    Determines the behavior of a validator.
    ConfigurationUpdater
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.
    GlobalConfiguration
    The configuration shared by all validators.
    Validators
    A factory that creates different types of validators.

    Class
    Description
    Configuration
    Determines the behavior of a validator.
    ConfigurationUpdater
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.
    GlobalConfiguration
    The configuration shared by all validators.

  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
    Class
    Description
    Configuration
    Determines the behavior of a validator.
    ConfigurationUpdater
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.
    EqualityMethod
    The method used to check whether two values are equal.
    GlobalConfiguration
    The configuration shared by all validators.
    JavaAssumeThat
    Creates validators for class invariants and method postconditions of the Java API, throwing AssertionError if a failure occurs.
    JavaCheckIf
    Creates validators for the Java API, recording any failures that occur.
    JavaRequireThat
    Creates validators for method preconditions of the Java API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
    JavaValidators
    Creates validators for the Java API with an independent configuration.
    MutableStringMappers
    Returns the String representation of objects.
    StringMapper
    Returns a String representation of an object.
    StringMappers
    Returns the String representation of objects.
    UpdatableGlobalConfiguration
    Updates the global configuration shared by all validators.
    ValidationFailure
    A failed validation.
    Validators
    A factory that creates different types of validators.
